links.source_location: Section 2(j)(i) - child included in Data Principal definition
Section 8(2) - DF engages DP only under valid contract
Section 9(1) - overrides s6 consent for children, requires verifiable parental consent
Section 4 - processing lawful either via consent OR legitimate uses (alternative ground)
Section 17(1) partially exempts Chapter II obligations
Section 10(1) - CG notifies Significant Data Fiduciaries
Section 16(1) - CG may restrict cross-border transfers by notification
Violation of s16 restriction is breach of Act, triggering s27(1)(b) and s33 penalties via indirect 3-hop path - no direct s16-to-Board structural link
Section 29 - appeals from Board to Tribunal
